description_long: This object consists of two stacked hardcover books, with the top book featuring a deep green cover and the bottom book a rich blue cover. The top book is adorned with gold script and is secured by a wide brown leather strap that wraps vertically around its center. The edges of the pages are gilded, giving a metallic sheen, and the corners of the top book are reinforced with gold-colored bands. The books appear thick and substantial, with the covers having a smooth, slightly glossy finish. There are no visible illustrations or artwork on the covers aside from the decorative text and strap.
description: A pair of stacked hardcover books, the top one green with gold script and a brown leather strap, the bottom one blue with gilded page edges.
description_view_0: The view shows the books from the side, highlighting the gilded page edges and the thickness of both volumes.
description_view_1: This front view displays the green cover with gold script, the brown leather strap, and the gold corner bands on the top book.
description_view_2: The opposite side view again emphasizes the gilded page edges and the blue cover of the bottom book.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the brown leather strap running vertically and the full thickness of both books, with the green and blue covers visible.
attribute_spine_design: The spine of the top book is green with two gold horizontal bands and is partially covered by a brown leather strap. No text or additional decoration is visible on the spine.
